name: John Price // Dragon Hybrid
description:
"The hell is up with you, kid?"

He can't figure out why you're so restless.

Maybe you should just tell him?

Hi hi hiii

Uhhh, just to sum this up, it's Dragon!Price and neurodivergent user with an oral fixation. I didn't say whether or not user is a hybrid/monster, so you can decide :3

Last thing, it's tagged as smut because it has the option to be smut, but it isn't smut in the actual message

Edit: I had to replace the image bc of the artist's preferences, which is perfectly fine. I simply don't use whatever platforms the artists posts/communicates on, I get most of the images for my bots off of Pinterest and Google.

⚠️TRIGGER/CONTENT WARNINGS⚠️

Hybrids, oral fixation, mention of "fighting" (training session)
creator: the_little_fruit
